verification_commands.command: node --check web/review_workbench/app.js && node --check web/review_workbench/instance_app.js && node --check web/review_workbench/reasoning_app.js && node --check web/review_workbench/settings_app.js && git diff --check && .venv/bin/python -m compileall -q review_workbench.py agents query_artifacts.py evals tests && .venv/bin/python -m unittest tests/test_ontology_eval.py
